name: Dover AFB
tagline: A major strategic airlift hub in Delaware and home of the nation's military mortuary, where fallen service members are returned with honor.
_note: Air Force strategic airlift base (Dover DE, state capital). CONUS full template (BAH MHA DE054 Dover AFB/Rehoboth; RentCast/SchoolDigger work). 436th Airlift Wing (C-5M/C-17) + AF Mortuary Affairs Operations (Dover Port Mortuary, dignified transfers). Medical: 436th Medical Group clinic. Facts verified from official sources (dover.af.mil, TRICARE/436 MDG, DeCA/AAFES, Wikipedia for corroborated headline facts). Delaware is TRICARE East. Note: DE has no state sales tax. Medium-confidence flags: base coords (approx), off-base ZIP 19901 (Dover).

data.Major unit: 436th Airlift Wing (C-5M Super Galaxy and C-17 strategic airlift)
data.Also home to: Air Force Mortuary Affairs Operations (Dover Port Mortuary)
data.Role: Major East Coast strategic airlift hub
data.Note: Delaware has no state sales tax

sections.title: Mission & Identity
data: Dover Air Force Base is one of the military's largest strategic airlift hubs, home to the 436th Airlift Wing flying the C-5M Super Galaxy and C-17 Globemaster III. Its aircraft move outsized cargo around the world.

Dover is also home to Air Force Mortuary Affairs Operations and the Dover Port Mortuary, where America's fallen service members are returned with honor in dignified transfers, a solemn mission that defines the base's character.

sections.title: Affordable Central Delaware, Near the Beaches

data.subtitle: Dover is an affordable state capital with no sales tax and the Delaware beaches an hour away. The main choice is on-base housing versus the Dover-area communities.
intro: Central Delaware is reasonably priced, and Delaware's lack of a state sales tax is a nice bonus, so BAH tends to stretch. On-base housing is available; many also live off base around Dover.
Where you live mostly comes down to commute and schools, with the Delaware and Maryland beaches within an easy drive for weekends.

recommendations.advice: Dover itself surrounds the base, with the shortest commute and the most amenities.
Camden-Wyoming and the surrounding Kent County areas are popular with families.
On-base housing is available and convenient; weigh it against the affordable local market.
Rehoboth, Lewes, and the Delaware beaches are roughly an hour southeast for weekends.

sections.title: Gates & Access
data: Visitors without a DoD ID need a visitor pass and a REAL ID-compliant ID from the Visitor Control Center.
Gate hours and visitor requirements change, so confirm the current details on the official Dover AFB site before you go.

sections.title: On-Base Housing
data: Dover AFB has privatized on-base family housing across several neighborhoods.
Eligibility and availability vary by rank and family size, so start with the housing office for the current manager, options, and waitlists.

source.label: DoD 2026 BAH Rates, MHA DE054 (Dover AFB/Rehoboth)

sections.title: Schools
data: There is no DoDEA district here; children attend the local civilian public schools. Capital School District serves Dover, with Caesar Rodney and other Kent County districts nearby depending on where you live.
Your assigned schools depend on your address, so confirm the district and campus for any neighborhood you are considering.

data.Care: Outpatient primary and some specialty care on base; inpatient, emergency, and complex care via local network hospitals

intro: Whether to rent or buy is the biggest money decision of most PCS moves, and Dover's affordable market and no-sales-tax bonus make buying a real option for many families.
rent: Your tour is short (about two years or less) or your orders feel uncertain.
You want time to learn the area before committing.
You'd rather not gamble on resale timing when you PCS out.
Your BAH comfortably covers rent in the areas you'd consider.
buy: You expect to be here three or more years.
You want to use your VA loan and build equity instead of paying rent.
The affordable central Delaware market fits your budget for a home you like.
You've found a neighborhood and commute you're confident about.
data.bottom_line: There is no universal right answer, but Dover's affordability makes buying worth a look for longer tours. Run your BAH against the rent and home prices above, weigh your tour length, and talk to a lender and an agent who work with military families before you commit.

intro: The first month at a new duty station is mostly logistics. Knocking these out early makes everything else easier.

steps.title: Line up temporary lodging
steps.text: Book on-base lodging or a short-term rental before you arrive. You can claim Temporary Lodging Expense (TLE) for a limited number of days while you house-hunt.

steps.title: In-process and update DEERS
steps.text: Report to your unit and finance, and make sure DEERS and ID cards are current for every family member so TRICARE and base access work.

steps.title: Start with the Housing Office
steps.text: Check on-base availability and get the housing office's read on the Dover area before you sign anything.

steps.title: Register your vehicle and sort access
steps.text: Handle base access and Delaware vehicle registration, and learn the visitor-pass process for guests. Bring your registration and insurance.

steps.title: Enroll the kids in school
steps.text: Contact the gaining district (Capital or Caesar Rodney) early and bring records and immunizations.

steps.title: Set up healthcare
steps.text: Update your TRICARE enrollment so you can be seen at the 436th Medical Group clinic or network providers.

data.q: What is Dover AFB known for?
data.a: It's a major strategic airlift hub flying C-5M and C-17 aircraft, and it's home to the Dover Port Mortuary, where fallen service members are returned with honor in dignified transfers.
On-base housing is available; many also live off base in and around Dover. Camden-Wyoming and Kent County are popular with families.
Yes. Central Delaware is reasonably priced, and Delaware has no state sales tax, so BAH stretches well. The beaches are about an hour away.
Dover AFB is MHA DE054 (Dover AFB/Rehoboth). Use the calculator above for your grade.
